description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a complex, dark hip roof and a white exterior. The front features a prominent entryway with steps leading up to a covered porch, flanked by symmetrical windows and a driveway. The rear of the house includes a backyard area with a swimming pool, a patio, and a detached circular structure, possibly a water tank or hot tub. The property is enclosed by a low boundary wall and includes paved walkways and driveways on both sides. Multiple windows of varying sizes are distributed across the facade, with some grouped in rows and others placed asymmetrically. The overall design suggests a blend of modern and traditional suburban architectural elements.
description: A large, two-story suburban house with a dark hip roof, white exterior, and a prominent front entryway. The property includes a backyard pool, patio, and is surrounded by paved driveways and a low boundary wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, steps, covered porch, symmetrical windows, and driveway.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard pool, patio area, circular structure, and side driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, patio, circular structure, and back entrance with steps.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side driveway, boundary wall, and additional exterior features.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with some asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, covered porch, and symmetrical flanking windows
